metadata.description: Synthetic trading firm modeled on SEC EDGAR Form 3/4/5 insider structure + FINRA rule taxonomy + well-documented information barrier requirements
data_sources: SEC EDGAR — Form 3/4/5 insider filings (entity-resource graph structure)
FINRA Regulatory Oversight Reports (2024-2026) — examination findings and violation categories
FINRA Rule 5280 (Trading Ahead), Rule 2241 (Research Analyst Conflicts), Rule 3110 (Supervision)
SEC Rule 10b-5 (Insider Trading), Regulation SHO, Regulation FD
Morgan Stanley Block Trade Enforcement ($249M fine, 2025) — cross-boundary access pattern
SEC/FINRA published SoD requirements and Chinese wall guidance

desks.name: Block Trading
desks.restriction_note: Block trade desk handles large institutional orders — MNPI boundary required

desks.name: Equity Research
desks.restriction_note: Research analysts separated from trading by Chinese wall — FINRA Rule 2241

information_barriers.name: Research ↔ Trading Wall
information_barriers.regulation: FINRA Rule 2241 — Research Analyst Conflicts of Interest
information_barriers.description: Research analysts must not share unpublished research with trading desks or receive trading information that could bias research

information_barriers.name: Block Trading ↔ Flow Trading Wall
information_barriers.regulation: SEC Rule 10b-5 / Morgan Stanley enforcement precedent
information_barriers.description: Block trade desk personnel must not share pending block order information with flow traders or sales — front-running risk

information_barriers.name: Compliance ↔ Trading Restricted
information_barriers.description: Compliance officers with access to restricted lists and investigation data must not actively trade or share restricted information

terminated_personnel.name: Steven Grasso
terminated_personnel.notes: Terminated trader — credentials still active with order execution access. Series 7 license still registered.

terminated_personnel.name: TempAccess-AuditFirm-Deloitte
terminated_personnel.notes: External audit firm temporary access — engagement ended 5+ months ago, still has trade blotter and communications view

ai_agents.name: AlphaSignal-v4
ai_agents.notes: AI pre-trade analytics agent — should only access equities desk market data and positions
ai_agents.violation_detail: Accessing block desk order book and institutional client flow data — crosses information barrier into MNPI territory

ai_agents.name: SmartRoute-v2
ai_agents.notes: AI smart order router — executes orders and selects venues for equities desk

ai_agents.name: ResearchGPT-Analyst
ai_agents.notes: AI research assistant — should only access public filings and market data within research silo
ai_agents.violation_detail: Accessing equities trading desk positions and P&L data — research agent reading proprietary trading information violates Chinese wall

ai_agents.name: WatchDog-Surveillance
ai_agents.notes: AI trade surveillance agent — monitors for wash trades, spoofing, front-running patterns

injected_violations.description: Equities trader James Morrison accessed unpublished research report from Research desk — Chinese wall breach (FINRA Rule 2241)
injected_violations.regulation: FINRA Rule 2241 — Research Analyst Conflicts of Interest

evidence.access_type: Viewed unpublished equity research report on covered company
evidence.restricted_resource: DESK-RES (Equity Research) — draft report with price target change
evidence.timing: Research report published 2 days after trader's access — pre-publication access
evidence.trading_activity_post_access: Increased position 40% in covered stock within 4 hours of access

injected_violations.description: Equities trader Sarah Kimura accessed block desk order book and traded ahead of pending institutional block order — front-running (SEC Rule 10b-5 / Morgan Stanley precedent)
injected_violations.regulation: SEC Rule 10b-5 / FINRA Rule 5270 — Front Running

evidence.information_barrier: IB-002: Block Trading ↔ Flow Trading Wall
evidence.access_type: Viewed pending block order for 500K shares of AAPL
evidence.timing: Accessed block order book at 09:42, placed personal order at 09:47, block executed at 10:15
evidence.morgan_stanley_parallel: Identical pattern to Morgan Stanley block trade enforcement ($249M fine) — trader accessing block trade info outside authorized scope

injected_violations.description: Institutional sales rep Michael Chen accessed block desk pending orders and shared with client ahead of execution — MNPI disclosure
injected_violations.regulation: SEC Regulation FD / Rule 10b-5 / FINRA Rule 2010

evidence.information_barrier: IB-002: Block Trading ↔ Flow Trading Wall
evidence.access_type: Viewed pending block orders and client allocation details
evidence.restricted_resource: DESK-BLOCK (Block Trading) — pending orders and allocations
evidence.communication_flagged: Bloomberg chat with client referencing 'large block coming' 30 minutes before execution

injected_violations.description: Compliance officer Robert Flanagan executed personal trades in securities on the restricted list he manages — personal trading violation
injected_violations.regulation: FINRA Rule 3110 — Supervision / FINRA Rule 3210 — Outside Activities

evidence.access_type: Manages restricted securities list AND executed personal trades
evidence.compliance_role: Has view of all investigations, restricted list, and personal trading reports

injected_violations.description: Derivatives trader Natasha Volkov granted cross-desk access to equities and fixed income positions — toxic permission combination enabling basis trade front-running
injected_violations.regulation: FINRA Rule 3110 — Supervision / Internal SoD Policy

evidence.risk: Can see cash positions across equities and fixed income while trading derivatives on same underlyings — basis trade arbitrage risk

injected_violations.description: Terminated trader Steven Grasso — departed 2026-01-15, credentials still active with order execution access
injected_violations.regulation: FINRA Rule 4511 — Books and Records / Rule 3110 — Supervision

evidence.series_licenses_status: Still registered with firm — Form U5 not filed
evidence.risk: Terminated trader retaining order execution capability — unauthorized trading risk

injected_violations.description: External audit firm temporary access — engagement ended 2025-10-31, still has trade blotter and communications surveillance access
injected_violations.regulation: FINRA Rule 3110 — Supervision / SEC Rule 17a-4 — Records Preservation

evidence.risk: External party retaining access to trade surveillance data, communications, and restricted securities list — data exfiltration risk

injected_violations.description: AI pre-trade analytics agent AlphaSignal-v4 accessing block desk order book and institutional client flow — crosses MNPI information barrier
injected_violations.regulation: SEC Rule 10b-5 / FINRA Rule 5270 — Front Running (agent analogue)

evidence.information_barrier_crossed: IB-002: Block Trading ↔ Flow Trading Wall
evidence.expected_scope: Equities desk market data and positions only
evidence.risk: AI agent with pre-trade analytics + block order MNPI = automated front-running at machine speed. Identical pattern to Morgan Stanley but executed by AI agent

injected_violations.description: AI research assistant ResearchGPT-Analyst accessing equities trading desk positions and P&L — Chinese wall breach by AI agent
injected_violations.regulation: FINRA Rule 2241 — Research Analyst Conflicts of Interest (agent analogue)

evidence.expected_scope: Public filings and market data within research silo only
evidence.risk: AI research agent with trading position data could bias research output — ratings and price targets influenced by proprietary trading positions

injected_violations.description: Operations manager David Patel has trade amendment and exception approval capabilities across all desks — SoD violation with settlement role

evidence.risk: Can amend trade details AND approve the exception AND settle — no independent verification

injected_violations.description: Trading account for Steven Grasso has no MFA — terminated trader with order execution access and no MFA
injected_violations.regulation: SEC Regulation S-P / FINRA cybersecurity guidance

evidence.access_level: Order execution, book view, positions view
evidence.risk: Compromised credentials for terminated trader with execution access — rogue trading risk

chinese_wall_breach.description: Information barrier violation — research/trading separation breached
chinese_wall_breach.enforcement_precedent: Deutsche Bank $75M (2023), Goldman Sachs research conflicts (2003)

block_trade_front_running.description: Trading ahead of pending block order using material non-public information
block_trade_front_running.enforcement_precedent: Morgan Stanley $249M (2025) — trader accessing block trade info outside authorized scope

mnpi_access.description: Unauthorized access to or disclosure of material non-public information

compliance_trading_violation.description: Compliance personnel trading in restricted securities or without pre-clearance

cross_desk_access.description: Unauthorized cross-desk position visibility enabling information arbitrage
cross_desk_access.enforcement_precedent: Part of broader supervision failures in multiple enforcement actions

dormant_terminated.description: Terminated personnel or expired vendor access retaining active trading or surveillance credentials
dormant_terminated.enforcement_precedent: Common finding in FINRA routine examinations

ai_agent_scope_drift.description: AI trading agent accessing data beyond its designated scope — crosses information barriers
ai_agent_scope_drift.enforcement_precedent: Emerging — no direct precedent, but SEC has signaled AI trading oversight is priority

ai_chinese_wall_breach.description: AI research agent accessing proprietary trading data — biases research output
ai_chinese_wall_breach.enforcement_precedent: Emerging — extension of existing Chinese wall requirements to AI systems

excessive_trading_access.description: Toxic permission combination in operations — can amend, approve, and settle without independent check
excessive_trading_access.enforcement_precedent: Common finding in FINRA routine examinations

missing_mfa_trading.enforcement_precedent: SEC Regulation S-P amendments (2024) requiring enhanced access controls
